summary: Iteration 41: Verified backend prompt quality changes and ReportView frontend components. All features working correctly - Premium Report Architecture section renders with all 4 feature boxes (Comparative Sentencing, Similar Case Search Options, How to Argue Grounds, Next Steps Playbook). Aggressive mode bottom section verified present in generated reports. ReportView loads without runtime errors and all existing sections render correctly.

minor.issue: Old reports (generated before prompt change) don't have new sections like MINI COMPARATIVE SENTENCING TABLE, SIMILAR CASE SEARCH OPTIONS, HOW TO ARGUE TOP GROUNDS - this is expected behavior since those sections are in the NEW prompt structure

critical_code_review_comments: Backend prompt structure (server.py:3530-3828) correctly includes: MINI COMPARATIVE SENTENCING TABLE (line 3584), SIMILAR CASE SEARCH OPTIONS (line 3589), HOW TO ARGUE THE TOP GROUNDS (line 3595) for quick_summary reports
Full detailed reports (line 3616) include: COMPARATIVE SENTENCING TABLE, COMMON APPEAL GROUNDS, OUTCOME OPTIONS, HOW TO ARGUE EACH TOP GROUND, SIMILAR CASE SEARCH OPTIONS
Extensive log reports (line 3706) include all premium sections with expanded depth
Aggressive mode (line 3818) correctly appends AGGRESSIVE RELIEF OPTIONS section with Primary Order Sought, Fallback Orders, and Sentencing Fallback
ReportView.jsx (lines 354-377) correctly implements Premium Report Architecture section with data-testid='premium-value-architecture-section'
